title: Iran Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei has verified account on X, Elon Musk's platform
summary_full: The newly created account was busy posting on Thursday, its first day being active on the X social media platform.
summary_public: The newly created account was busy posting on Thursday, its first day being active on the X social media platform.
